pi_items.source: task.json description specifies creating a 'Finance' schema as step 1
task.json description and export_result.sh validation scripts confirm these two user-created tables
task.json description step 4 explicitly requires stored procedure 'Finance.usp_PostSalesToGL'
task.json description step 6 explicitly requires view 'Finance.vw_UnbalancedTransactions'
task.json description step 2 explicitly lists all 7 account codes with account types: 1100=AR/Asset, 2100=Tax/Liability, 4001-4004=Sales Revenue by Territory, 4100=Freight
Verified via web search: AdventureWorks2022 contains sales data from 2013-2014, Q1 2013 runs from January 1 through March 31. Task.json description specifies Q1 2013 date range.
Verified via web search: Q1 2013 end date is March 31. Task.json description step 5 specifies '2013-03-31' as end date for Q1 2013.
setup_mssql.sh line 15 specifies exact download URL for AdventureWorks2022.bak, which is the official Microsoft sample database

pi_items.verified_value: Real Microsoft SQL Server sample database (not synthetic)
pi_items.source: AdventureWorks2022 is official Microsoft sample database per https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/samples/adventureworks-install-configure. Web search confirms SalesTerritory contains real groups: North America, Europe, Pacific matching revenue account codes 4001, 4002, 4003.
Web search of AdventureWorks2022 SalesTerritory table confirms these geographic groups. Task uses these for revenue account mapping in step 4.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses the real Microsoft AdventureWorks2022 sample database (not synthetic data). The source data includes Sales.SalesOrderHeader records from Q1 2013 (January 1 - March 31, 2013). The task requires creating a Finance schema with two user-created tables: ChartOfAccounts and GeneralLedger, containing exactly 7 seeded account codes (1100=AR, 2100=Tax Payable, 4001-4003=Sales Revenue by region, 4004=Other Region Revenue, 4100=Freight). The stored procedure usp_PostSalesToGL transforms Q1 2013 sales orders into balanced double-entry journal entries using territory mappings. A vw_UnbalancedTransactions view is required for audit verification.
